title: List Assets
content:
# List Assets

Returns a list of Assets and its parameters. The Assets can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.

## Endpoint

`GET /assets/list`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.asset.listAssets()
print(response)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search and filter on the list based on the keys `title` (Display Name) or `name`. All values in array will be filtered as `OR`. The search is case insensitive and will find partial matches as well.

parameters.name: names
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `name`. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: asset_type_name
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `asset_type_name`. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: status_state
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key ['status']['state']. Multiple statuses can be given and will be filtered as `OR`. The allowed values are: `online`, `offline`, `unknown`.
